projectDescription: A self-hostable web proxy service that bypasses network filters and censorship in-browser, supporting Tor/Onion routing, multiple proxy engines, and an integrated games library.
keyFeatures: Multiple built-in proxy engines: Scramjet, Ultraviolet, and Rammerhead
Tor/Onion and SOCKS5 routing support in any browser
DOM masquerading and source randomization for filter evasion
Integrated adblocking via modified service worker
Tab title and icon stealth customization
Built-in HTML5 games library, Flash emulation via Ruffle, and RetroArch emulators
Production-ready with PM2, Docker, and NGINX support
Wisp protocol with Bare-Mux transport swapping (EpoxyTransport, libcurl-transport)
publicApiSurface: GET /:path — Serves HTML pages defined in src/routes.mjs
GET /github/:redirect — Redirects to external GitHub project links
config.json: minifyScripts, randomizeIdentifiers, production, disguiseFiles, usingSEO
ecosystem.config.js: PORT, NODE_ENV, PM2 worker/restart configuration
register-sw.js: wispUrl, proxyUrl, transports, defaultMode, ScramjetController
common.js: goProx, prSet, getDomain, goFrame, sx, urlHandler, asyncUrlHandler
npm run fresh-install / start / restart / stop / kill / build / clean / proxy-validator
